creator: paul.g.webster@googlemail.com
text:
Following a talk with Kubilay it was decided to remove the functionality entirely at this point; I have done so and committed it to github here https://github.com/PaulGWebster/bugzilla/commit/e1c72900eee16eb923f9d7e3f0d65358dbf8405a

It was decided to not extend the functionality as use cases for the function where to narrow and or unclear to warrant the addition of the required code; if it is required in the future it will be re-implemented fresh.
